summary_en: 1,000,000 shares (4.18% of outstanding) cancelled effective 2026-05-27. Post-cancellation issued shares: 22,914,414.
title_en: Notice of Completion of Treasury Share Cancellation
translation_en_brief: Tayca Corporation announced completion of treasury share cancellation as of 2026-05-27, in accordance with a Board resolution dated 2026-05-13 and Article 178 of the Companies Act. The company cancelled 1,000,000 ordinary shares, representing 4.18% of issued shares outstanding prior to cancellation. Following completion, total issued shares stand at 22,914,414.
